title: Security Overview
content: All customer data is encrypted in transit using TLS 1.2+ and at rest using AES-256. Keys are managed via a dedicated KMS with quarterly rotation.

title: Security Overview
content: Access to production systems requires multi-factor authentication, is logged centrally, and is restricted by least-privilege roles.

title: Compliance and Audits
content: The platform maintains SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001 certifications with annual third-party audits.

title: Service Level Agreement
content: The standard SLA provides 99.9% monthly uptime with service credits issued for breaches based on monthly spend.

title: Pricing Sheet
content: Enterprise plan starts at $6,000 per month for up to 50 users. Additional users are billed at $85 per user per month.

title: Pricing Sheet
content: Professional services: onboarding is a one-time fee of $12,000 and includes system configuration, SSO setup, and training.

title: Implementation Plan
content: Typical implementation takes 4 to 6 weeks, including discovery, data ingestion, validation, and user acceptance testing.

title: Support Policy
content: Support hours are 24x5 with a 1 business hour response time for P1 incidents. P2 incidents have a 4 hour response time.
